actions.text: draw your blade and advance toward the right fork
press yourself against the wall and listen carefully
Who's there? Show yourself.
step forward into the amber light
study the carvings on the wall near the entrance to the right passage
A copper dragon emerges from the shadows, its eyes gleaming with amusement
hold your ground and meet the dragon's gaze without flinching
I mean no harm. I'm looking for a way through.
I've heard copper dragons value a good riddle. Care to trade one?
reach into your pack and produce the stolen map
This map — do you recognise these markings?
study the dragon's reaction carefully for any sign of recognition
back away slowly toward the fork junction to get more space
crouch and examine the floor for pressure plates or traps
A distant crash echoes from the left passage, followed by silence
Xarenth — whatever's in that left passage, it heard us.
duck behind a fallen column at the sound of movement
check the walls of the right passage for a side passage or hidden door
climb over the rubble blocking the far archway
The amber light dims as something large moves in the passage behind you
draw a dagger and scan the darkness ahead
press forward into the large vaulted chamber beyond the archway
What built this place? Do you know?
look for another exit on the far side of the chamber
The stolen map begins to glow with a faint blue light
hold the map up toward the carved symbols on the ceiling
The map is leading somewhere. I need to follow it.
follow the glowing path marked on the map deeper into the dungeon
push open the heavy stone door at the end of the passage
Beyond the door lies a treasure vault, undisturbed for centuries
